title: Nilpotent inverse semigroups with central idempotents
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:

Burnside for finite nilpotent groups is developed introducing the concepts of ascending resp. descending central series in an inverse semigroup, and it is shown that almost all of the well-known properties of finite nilpotent groups do hold also for the class of finite inverse semigroups with central idempotents.
